prompt: A surreal architectural structure of interconnected staircases where each individual staircase ascends upward, but the overall structure forms a continuous descending loop into a central void, impossible geometry, coherent perspective, minimalistic environment, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, no people, no human figures --no text, letters, words, symbols, inscriptions, engravings, labels, numbers, charts, graphs, measurement scales, tick marks, cartouches, decorative borders, captions, watermarks, signatures
